dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8974 IH: To authorize the Development Finance Corporation to invest in Venezuela.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Issa (for himself and Ms. Salazar) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Foreign Affairs

form.official-title: To authorize the Development Finance Corporation to invest in Venezuela.

subsection.text: Section 1402(3) of the BUILD Act of 2018 (22 U.S.C. 9601(3)) is amended—

paragraph.text: by redesignating subparagraphs (B) through (G) as subparagraphs (A) through (F), respectively.

subsection.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the Development Finance Corporation may invest in the Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela.
